Score points with each merge and aim to create the ultimate watermelon. If fruits pile up and cross the danger line at the top, the game ends. Plan your drops carefully to manage space and maximize merges! FRUIT MATCH

Match Game is a physics-based fruit merging puzzle. Drop fruits into a container where identical fruits merge into larger ones when they collide. Progress through the fruit sequence: cherry → strawberry → grape → orange → apple → pear → peach → pineapple → melon → watermelon. Score points with each merge and aim to create the ultimate watermelon. If fruits pile up and cross the danger line at the top, the game ends. Plan your drops carefully to manage space and maximize merges!

Controls: LEFT ARROW/A: Move left | RIGHT ARROW/D: Move right | SPACE/DOWN/S: Drop fruit | ESC: Pause | ENTER: Start | R: Restart
